simple_types.name: GPIO0_DRIVE_Field
simple_types.code:
type GPIO0_DRIVE_Field is
  (Val_2mA,
   Val_4mA,
   Val_8mA,
   Val_12mA)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: VOLTAGE_SELECT_VOLTAGE_SELECT_Field
simple_types.code:
type VOLTAGE_SELECT_VOLTAGE_SELECT_Field is
   Val_3v3,
   Val_1v8)
  with Size => 1;
